heading: North Brother vs North Curl Curl — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between North Brother, New South Wales and North Curl Curl, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: North Curl Curl has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to North Brother (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is North Brother or North Curl Curl safer from flooding?
faq.answer: North Brother has a flood risk score of 44/100, while North Curl Curl scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: North Brother scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. North Curl Curl scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in North Brother or North Curl Curl?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. North Curl Curl has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
